active_role: Olares Validated Artifact Publication And Host Reconciliation Operator
dependency_note: Packet 043 selected publication-first because the Packet 040 artifact is workstation-validated, the workstation and host mirror still share the exact two-file diff SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`, tracked package and lockfile paths remain clean, and defer would preserve unnecessary dual dirty state.
required_inputs: Workstation diff scope and SHA-256 for the validated Packet 040 source/test artifact
Current Packet 040 through Packet 043 authority surfaces
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, exact dirty-file scope, and host diff SHA-256
Current old-clone branch, commit, and status count at `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`
constrained_outputs: A bounded publication commit and push containing only the validated Packet 040 two-file source/test artifact plus required Packet 040 through Packet 044 authority surfaces, excluding unrelated `.vercelignore`, package/lockfile mutation, runtime/service artifacts, and unrelated drift

A host reconciliation record proving `/home/olares/code/apex` reached clean parity with the published commit without force/reset/clean, remote rewrite, runtime/service mutation, package mutation, install, or old-clone mutation

A publication and reconciliation handoff recording staged scope, commit hash, push result, host pre/post state, host dirty-artifact equivalence proof, package/lockfile cleanliness, old-clone preservation, and the next decision candidate
validation_steps: Reconfirm the workstation diff remains limited to the two scoped Packet 040 source/test files and still matches SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`.
Reconfirm tracked package and lockfile paths remain clean and `.vercelignore` remains unrelated and excluded.

Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` remains on `clean-main` at `f39f8ddb3593c79333280d3aceabc9d0ceadc1c2` with exactly the same two-file host artifact and SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only the validated source/test artifact and required Packet 040 through Packet 044 authority surfaces from the parent root.
Run `git diff --cached --check` and inspect staged path scope before committing.
Commit and push the bounded publication only if staged scope is exact and package/lockfile paths remain clean.

After publication, reconcile `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit using non-destructive fast-forward and tracked-file reconciliation only after proving the dirty host artifact matches the published artifact.

Do not force, reset, clean, rewrite remotes, mutate `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`, install dependencies, mutate packages or lockfiles, mutate runtime or services, approve migration, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, or change canonical-hosting.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no runtime, service, package, lockfile, install, remote rewrite, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, rollback, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded parent-root publication of the validated artifact and required authority surfaces, followed by non-destructive reconciliation of `/home/olares/code/apex` after equivalence proof.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 044 published the validated Packet 040 two-file source/test artifact plus required Packet 040 through Packet 044 authority surfaces in parent-root commit `c6a1546c4b61b53b823d65dae4fbcdfed24c33c0`, pushed it to `origin/clean-main`, proved the dirty `/home/olares/code/apex` host artifact matched the published source diff SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`, reconciled `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity at `c6a1546c4b61b53b823d65dae4fbcdfed24c33c0` using a path-scoped temporary stash and fast-forward pull, dropped the temporary duplicate stash after clean parity, preserved tracked package and lockfile paths, excluded unrelated `.vercelignore` and Packet 039 drift, and left `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` untouched.
next_action: Open only Packet 045 post-044 workstation-migration readiness reassessment. Do not treat Packet 044 publication hygiene as migration approval or generic Olares reopening.
